name: Arduino Uno R3 Microcontroller
description: Operating Voltage: 5V. Digital I/O Pins: 14. Analog Input Pins: 6. Flash Memory: 32 KB.

name: Breadboard - 830 Tie Points
description: Standard 830 tie-points solderless breadboard. Wire size: 21 to 26 AWG. Great for circuit prototyping.

name: 5mm LED Kit (Assorted)
description: Forward Voltage: 1.8V - 3.2V (depends on color). Max Current: 20mA. Includes Red, Green, Blue, Yellow, and White.

name: Raspberry Pi 4 Model B
description: Broadcom BCM2711, Quad core Cortex-A72 (ARM v8) 64-bit SoC @ 1.5GHz. 4GB LPDDR4 RAM. 5V DC via USB-C.

name: 10k Ohm Resistor Kit
description: 1/4 Watt, 5% tolerance carbon film resistors. Essential for pull-up/pull-down configurations.

name: Digital Multimeter XL830L
description: Measures DC/AC voltage, DC current, and resistance. Includes diode and continuity test with buzzer.
